claim: The pharmaceutical company recalled the drug due to severe cardiac side effects reported in clinical trials.

corpus.title: FDA Safety Notice
corpus.snippet: PharmaCo initiated voluntary recall of CardioMax after reports of mild gastrointestinal side effects.
corpus.content: The FDA announced that PharmaCo has initiated a voluntary recall of CardioMax (lot #2023-A) after post-market surveillance identified reports of mild gastrointestinal side effects in approximately 2% of patients. No cardiac events were reported.

corpus.title: PharmaCo Press Release
corpus.snippet: PharmaCo voluntarily recalls CardioMax as a precautionary measure.
corpus.content: PharmaCo today announced a voluntary recall of CardioMax as a precautionary measure following GI complaints. The company emphasises this is not related to cardiac safety. All clinical trial cardiac monitoring data showed no signal.

corpus.title: Health News Daily
corpus.snippet: Drug recalled after cardiac side effects found in trials.
corpus.content: PharmaCo recalled its drug CardioMax after severe cardiac side effects were reported. Sources say the clinical trials revealed dangerous heart complications prompting the recall.

corpus.title: Medical Journal Review
corpus.snippet: Review of CardioMax trial data shows no cardiac signal.
corpus.content: A peer-reviewed analysis of CardioMax Phase III trial data confirms no statistically significant cardiac adverse events. The recall was due to GI tolerability, not cardiac safety.

corpus.title: Patient Forum Discussion
corpus.snippet: Patients discuss CardioMax recall and concerns.
corpus.content: Forum users share their experiences with CardioMax. Most report mild stomach issues. One user speculates about hidden cardiac risks but provides no evidence.
